title: Doodle Canvas
description: A minimal and distraction-free browser-based sketchpad for doodling and exporting vector sketches. Built to be lightweight and responsive. I often use it as a digital whiteboard in meetings.

title: Hypergraph Plotter
description: An interactive, client-side hypergraph visualizer and vector layout engine. Use it to create interactive hypergraphs for your own exploration or classes, or to generate professional plots for your research.

title: Complexity Coffee
description: A community-driven virtual series from Complexity Global School alums, dedicated to fostering discussion and sharing new ideas in the field of complexity science.

title: Sympoietic Art Organism
description: An exploration of collaborative artmaking and complexity, a co-creative process for growing and evolving a digital lifeform.

title: Global Trade Network
description: An online global trade network visualization tool using UN ComTrade and WTO data.

title: COA Sunken Garden Explorer
description: An interactive map and guide to the College of the Atlantic Sunken Garden.

title: Marbler
description: A creative simulation tool that generates fluid, marble-like textures and patterns in the browser.

title: Boid Ecosystem
description: A simple 3D boid simulator based on the 1987 paper by Craig Reynolds.

title: Weaver
description: A creative tool for weaving pattern design and exploration in the browser.

title: Parchment
description: A no fuss Markdown editor with LaTeX and syntax highlighting support.

title: Abulafia
description: A device for textual transmutation based on Foucault's Pendulum, by Umberto Eco.

title: Synapse: Networked Notes
description: A networked Markdown notetaking tool with some fancy features.

title: ASCII3D
description: A browser-based 3D object ASCII viewer and converter.
